name: Function Calling
description: Selects an external callable, emits schema-valid arguments, invokes the function or API, and integrates the returned result into the agent loop.
conditions: Requires an available function or tool catalog with machine-readable argument schemas and result contracts.

evidence.notes: ToolLLM / ToolBench demonstrates LLM tool invocation over 16,000+ real-world APIs with documented evaluation tasks and failure analysis, supporting function calling as a schema-driven tool-use pattern.
Gorilla / APIBench evaluates model generation of API calls across large API collections, including accurate endpoint and argument selection.
